# hetzner_boot_rescue (Data Source)

Read rescue boot configuration for a Hetzner dedicated server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_boot_rescue" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) The server number.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether rescue mode is currently active.
- `keyboard` (String) Keyboard layout.
- `os` (String) Active OS or empty if inactive.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Generated password (only available on activation).
- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network.
